descFull: End-to-end Data Lakehouse project built on Databricks, following the Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold). Covers real-world data engineering and analytics workflows using Spark, PySpark, SQL, Delta Lake, and Unity Catalog. Designed for learning, portfolio building, and job interviews.
